texto: A positive needs a negative to complete its cycle, as the Moon needs an embodiment of itself, the Sun, to complete the cycle of its illusory essence, the Earth. texto: Every form is an image. Every image is a name. Every name is an attribute, every attribute a verb. Every object be it animated or non-animated is an image!!
